itinerary.title: Hanoi Sightseeing
itinerary.description: You are scheduled to be picked up from your hotel by our tour guide within the hours of 8:00 - 8:30 am. This marks the inception of a wonderful Hanoi city tour. Our itinerary practically directs us towards the Ho Chi Minh complex, which is the resting place of the Vietnamese great father known as Uncle Ho. There is an adventurous thriller which allows you to take a peek at the embalmed body of the great man as it is practically there on display. This also affords you a walk around a couple of ho

itinerary.title: Hanoi – Halong Bay
itinerary.description: Our journey embarks from Hanoi where we'll pick you up for a scenic drive through the verdant landscapes of the Red River Delta. Our destination: the world-famous UNESCO World Heritage site, Halong Bay, Lan Ha Bay. Here, you'll embark on a luxurious cruise for an enchanting overnight cruise.As you relax on board, you'll be captivated by the breathtaking limestone karsts that majestically emerge from the azure waters, surrounded by thousands of jungle-clad islands seemingly suspended on the gentl

Here, you'll embark on a luxurious cruise for an enchanting overnight cruise

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Hanoi – Hoi An
itinerary.description: Kickstart your day with Tai Chi on the top deck or savor the sunrise over the bay. Sip on morning coffee or tea before setting out to explore nearby islands via rowboat.Upon returning to the junk, witness a fruit carving demonstration and participate in a cooking class, learning to create traditional Vietnamese cuisine from scratch. Enjoy a Vietnamese lunch on board as you cruise back to Halong City. Upon arrival, your driver will be waiting at the dock to take you to Noi Bai Airport for your sh

itinerary.title: Hoi An Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Your tour guide guide will rendezvous with you at our hotel in the heart of Hoi An, commencing an exquisite half-day exploration. Begin at the vibrant Hoi An Market, an immersive shopping haven teeming with sights, sounds, and aromatic sensations. Adjacent to the market, the Phuc Kien Chinese Assembly Hall beckons with its vibrant blend of ornate gates, dragon statues, and intricate rooftops. Delve into ancestral worship, observing devotees' rituals at the family altar.Marvel at the enduring bea

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh Sightseeing - Cu Chi tunnels
itinerary.description: Take the morning trip to visit Independence Palace, also known at the Reunification palace, was built on the sight of the former Norodom palace. The Independence palace is a widely known landmark of Ho Chi Minh City and was designed by the architect Ngo Viet Thu. Continue seeing the beautiful structures from the French Colonial times such as the Notre Dame Cathedral, the historic Central Post Office. Followed by the remarkable site of the War Remnants Museum the museum has a vast display of the
activities: Take the morning trip to visit Independence Palace, also known at the Reunification palace, was built on the sight of the former Norodom palace
The Independence palace is a widely known landmark of Ho Chi Minh City and was designed by the architect Ngo Viet Thu

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh – Mekong Delta
itinerary.description: Escape the urban hustle of Ho Chi Minh City as you embark on a journey to My Tho, a serene town nestled on the left bank of the Mekong River. Upon arrival, explore the historic Vinh Trang Pagoda, dating back to the late 19th century. Board a sampan and cruise along the Mekong, discovering the enchanting Dragon, Unicorn, Phoenix, and Tortoise islands.Pause at Unicorn Island to stroll along country lanes, marvel at orchards, and relish tropical fruits amid the melodies of local folk songs. Explore

itinerary.title: 2. Your Journey, Your Way
itinerary.description: Indulge in the freedom to shape your adventure with our unparalleled customization and flexibility. Tailor your itinerary based on your preferences, interests, and budget, and watch as your dreams of an ideal South East Asia journey come to life. At Asia Tour Advisor, your satisfaction is our compass.

itinerary.title: 3. All-Inclusive Splendor
itinerary.description: Let us handle the details while you bask in the beauty of your surroundings. Our all-inclusive packages cover flights, accommodations, transportation, guided tours, and meals. itinerary.title: 4. 100% Customer Satisfaction
itinerary.description: Travel is an investment in unforgettable experiences, and your happiness is non-negotiable. With our bold 100% money-back guarantee, we assure you that we will fully refund and offer redeemable alternatives if any aspect of your trip fails to meet your expectations. Your satisfaction is not merely a goal; it is our unwavering commitment.
